ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Withdrawal from Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We would like to inform you that a withdrawal of $250.00 was made from your checking account on 2026-04-07 at 09:45 AM. The transaction reference number is 123456789. If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact our customer service immediately at <URL>.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
Your Bank

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Purchase
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

I hope you are doing well. I need to urgently request your assistance in purchasing a $50 Amazon gift card for me. This is a time-sensitive matter, and I need the card sent to me by the end of the day.

Please use the following link to complete the purchase: <URL> and confirm when you have done so.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
[CEO Name]
Chief Executive Officer
